summary: Task 01 cleanly removes NotRecordable:true from the 5 production view definitions and updates exactly the count-based tests and comments shifted by the change, with no production-logic edits beyond the generalized record.go comment. Cross-file consistency is sound: no residual NotRecordable:true remains in view.go, the drop branch and its synthetic guard test (TestFilterViews_dropsExplicitNotRecordable) are untouched, TestNew stays at 27, and the affected tests are green. All acceptance criteria are met.
